Name: City Care Hospital
Description: Highly experienced neurologists and advanced brain surgery facilities. Best choice for neurology and critical care treatments.

Name: Apollo Multispeciality
Description: Top doctors with years of experience in cardiology and organ transplant. Excellent for heart surgeries and emergency care.

Name: Sunrise Medical Center
Description: Expert dermatologists and cosmetic specialists. Ideal for skin treatments and aesthetic procedures.

Name: Green Valley Hospital
Description: Renowned orthopedic surgeons with modern equipment. Best for bone fractures and joint replacement surgeries.

Name: Lifeline Hospital
Description: Highly skilled general physicians and ICU specialists. Trusted for emergency and intensive care treatments.

Name: Medico Plus
Description: Experienced pediatricians and child care specialists. Perfect for newborn and child health services.

Name: NeuroCare Institute
Description: Top neurologists with advanced neuro-surgery units. Best for brain and spine-related treatments.

Name: HeartBeat Hospital
Description: Expert cardiologists with modern cardiac labs. Ideal for heart checkups and bypass surgeries.

Name: Wellness Hospital
Description: Multi-speciality doctors with holistic treatment approach. Good for general health and preventive care.

Name: Care & Cure Hospital
Description: Highly trained surgeons and emergency staff. Best for trauma care and surgical procedures.
